name: taskagent-claude
title: TaskAgent for Claude Code
summary: MCP-based task and plan tracker for Claude Code + oh-my-claudecode. Replaces ad-hoc in-session task lists with a durable multi-agent tracker.
description: taskagent-claude wires the tupical/taskagent MCP server into Claude Code and oh-my-claudecode. It ships /taskagent-claude:{tasks,plan,next,mine,branch-tasks,start,doctor,setup,sync,capture,status,close} slash commands and skills for the full parse → decompose → plan → execute pipeline. A project-init command writes a managed policy block into CLAUDE.md that makes taskagent the single source of truth for tasks and plans, and prevents OMC skills (/plan, /ralph, /ultrawork, /autopilot) from creating files under .omc/plans/. A SessionStart hook proactively prints open tasks; a Stop hook triggers auto-record.

npx.description: One-shot installer — detects Claude Code and writes ~/.claude/settings.json MCP entry

tokenDiscovery.description: Set TASKAGENT_TOKEN for headless/CI use. For interactive setup run `taskagent-claude pair`.

commands.description: Open tasks as a compact markdown table.
Claim the next ready task and print a brief.
Full parse → decompose → execute pipeline via omc team.
List tasks linked to the current git branch.
Sync session state with taskagent (pull open tasks, push updates).
Capture the current session artifacts as a taskagent comment.
Print status of active tasks and current plan.
Close a task — mark it done and write a closing comment.
Check Claude Code + taskagent MCP readiness.
Print install hints for missing dependencies.

hooks.SessionStart: Proactively prints open taskagent tasks on every session start.
hooks.Stop: Triggers auto-record of session artifacts onto the active task.

policy.description: Managed policy block in CLAUDE.md makes taskagent the default tracker and prevents OMC skills from creating .omc/plans/ files.
